positive: A detailed, symmetrical design featuring a majestic celestial crescent moon interwoven with bioluminescent mystical flora and swirling cosmic dust. The style is Neo-Tattoo Botanical illustration, characterized by sharp linework, clean silhouettes, and highly saturated gradient colors: deep indigo, teal, glowing gold, and emerald green. The composition must be centered, elegant, and suitable for a high-contrast apparel print. Include perfect symmetry, crisp edges, and a dreamlike, ethereal quality, isolated on a plain background.
negative: blurry, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, bad anatomy, disfigured, asymmetrical, noisy, grain, messy, gradient wash, photorealistic
